data.body:
[Chief PD's Appreciation Gift]

A thank-you message and gift from the Chief PD have arrived. Please continue to show your love and support!

Check your mailbox for Pyroxene x1,200!
(Can be received until 2/5 14:59 (UTC))

💌Thank-You Message: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/96479

#BlueArchive
